3064000.name: ゴーストパーティー　眠り姫
3064000.description:
Story
You have lost the world where "ghost" coexisted with "human".
You of this world do not seem to have memory somehow or other.
Because a you lives in this world,you will transmigrate in "ghost".
A trip to regain your memory with friends of ghost begins！

Play time
five hours～

Game degree of difficulty
witch :★★
gyeongsi :★★
doll :★★★
fox:★★★
snow :★★★★★

Characteristic of this game
・Selectable Hero！
　You can have an adventure in favorite you！
・Transparence！
　Because You can evade encount, You can enjoy the play that stress is free
・Hidden passage discovery！
　You can expect a reduction of working hours play by finding a hidden passage!
・Minimalism
　While a monster does not drop money by this game, it becomes easy to drop accessories
　You can taste a feeling to be refreshing very much as money accumulates by selling accessories in a mass

※Only at the time of player name input, a keyboard is necessary.
